zh.lifeSummary: Amabil de Trafford是Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford的女兒，於1220年出生在英國藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾。她於1240年與Robert de Radcliffe在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1288年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾拉德克利夫享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Trafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Trafford (Lancashire), Trafford in Chipping Warden (Northamptonshire), and Bridge, Mickle, and Wimbolds Trafford (Cheshire). The Northamptonshire placename probably derives from Old English træppe ‘trap’ + ford ‘ford’. The Cheshire placenames derive from Old English trōg ‘trough’ + ford. The Lancashire placename is a development of Stretford (Lancashire); most cases of the surname probably derive from this place. Early members of the de Trafford family, recorded here from the 13th century, were also recorded in medieval documents as de Stratford(e). Both the surname and the placename lost the initial S-. The manor of Trafford was carved out of Stretford township, and perhaps because its manor house was located at some distance from Stretford village, Trafford was adopted for the new settlement from an early date. See also Stratford .

variants.name: Stratford
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Stratford, for example in Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire, Middlesex, Northamptonshire, Suffolk, Warwickshire, and Wiltshire, from Old English strǣt ‘Roman road’ (see Street ) + ford ‘ford’.

habitational name principally from Strafford Sands (now lost) in Mexborough (Yorkshire), presumed to be the ancient meeting-place of Strafforth Wapentake, and deriving from the same source as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Amabil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin amabilis ‘lovable’ via Old French. Although now very rare in the English-speaking world, this name lies behind the much commoner name Annabel and also Mabel . It gained some currency from being borne by the character Amabel Rose Adams in Angela Thirkell's Barsetshire Chronicles ( 1933 onwards).

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Amabil de Trafford was born in 1220, in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England as the daughter of Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford. She married Robert de Radcliffe in 1240, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1288, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Amabil de Trafford est née en 1220, à Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Angleterre, fille de Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford. Elle a épousé Robert de Radcliffe en 1240, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1288, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Amabil de Trafford wurde 1220 in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England, als Tochter von Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford geboren. Sie hat 1240 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Robert de Radcliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1288 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Amabil de Trafford è nata il nel 1220 nel Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England come figlia di Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford. Lei sposato Robert de Radcliffe nel 1240, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1288, nel Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amabil de Traffordは1220年にイギリスランカシュアイアトラフォード マノーでHenry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretfordの娘として生まれた。1240年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでRobert de Radcliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1288年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amabil de Trafford(은)는 1220년 영국 랭카실르 트래퍼드 먼어에서 Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Robert de Radcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1288년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 라드클리프에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Amabil de Trafford nasceu em 1220, em Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Inglaterra filha de Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford. ru.lifeSummary: Amabil de Trafford родилась в 1220 г. в местности траффорд манор, ланкашир, Англия. Её отца звали Henry de Trafford II Lord of Trafford and Stretford. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Radcliffe в 1240 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1288 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.
